examples: A series of mineralogical parameters have been obtained.
Mineralogical phases and remelting texture of granite are reviewed.
Composition and mineralogical characteristics of slag during steelmaking with different hot metal were studied.
All the chemical and mineralogical evidence suggests that there have been no warm and wet periods in Martian history.
Once this procedure is complete, a tiny sample will be delivered to the onboard labs, Sam and CheMin, to run chemical and mineralogical analyses.
